text.title: Web Scraping Agentic Workflow Decision Tree
text.summary: Routes a scrape run by robots / render-mode / validation / drift. Branches name observable run-report fields; leaves reference rules.

decision-tree.root-question: Are prerequisites satisfied: target URL, schema, storage path, contact UA?

branch.when: prereqs_met == true AND robots_check_allowed == true AND tool_matches_render_mode == false
prereqs_met == true AND robots_check_allowed == true AND tool_matches_render_mode == true AND validation_ratio < 0.9
prereqs_met == true AND robots_check_allowed == true AND tool_matches_render_mode == true AND validation_ratio >= 0.9 AND drift_score > 5
prereqs_met == true AND robots_check_allowed == true AND tool_matches_render_mode == true AND validation_ratio >= 0.9 AND drift_score <= 5

text.example: prereqs_met=true → robots_allowed=true → tool ssr+httpx-selectolax match → validation_ratio=8/124=0.065 → verdict=block-validation-low (ref r4-validate-rows). Drift would have also caught it.
